title: apium repens
intro: Apium repens, also known as wild celery or smallage, is a biennial plant that belongs to the carrot family (Apiaceae) and is native to Europe, Asia, and North Africa. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Apium repens include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and act as a diuretic, making it a popular herbal remedy for various conditions. Apium repens can be prepared in various forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
